title: Velocity-Form Data-Enabled Predictive Control of Soft Robots Under Unknown External Payloads
title_zh: 未知外部载荷下软体机器人的速度形式数据驱动预测控制
abstract: Data-driven control methods such as data-enabled predictive control (DeePC) have shown strong potential for efficient control of soft robots without explicit parametric models. However, in object manipulation tasks, unknown external payloads and disturbances can significantly alter the system dynamics and behavior, leading to offset errors and degraded control performance. In this letter, we present a novel velocity-form DeePC framework that achieves robust and optimal control of soft robots under unknown payloads. The proposed framework leverages input/output data in an incremental representation to mitigate performance degradation induced by unknown payloads, eliminating the need for weighted datasets or disturbance estimators. We validate the method experimentally on a planar soft robot and demonstrate its improved performance compared to standard DeePC in scenarios involving unknown payloads.
abstract_zh: 数据驱动控制方法，如数据驱动预测控制（DeePC），在无需显式参数模型的情况下，已展现出对软体机器人高效控制的巨大潜力。然而，在物体操作任务中，未知的外部载荷和扰动会显著改变系统动力学和行为，导致偏移误差和控制性能下降。本文提出了一种新颖的速度形式DeePC框架，实现了未知载荷下软体机器人的鲁棒和最优控制。该框架利用增量表示中的输入/输出数据来减轻未知载荷引起的性能退化，无需加权数据集或扰动估计器。我们在平面软体机器人上进行了实验验证，并展示了在未知载荷场景下，该方法相比标准DeePC具有更优的性能。
tldr_zh: 提出速度形式DeePC，无需模型即可鲁棒控制未知载荷下的软体机器人。
cover_zh: 软体机器人遇上未知载荷？这个新框架不用模型也能稳如老狗！
